creator: ezolin@bol.com.br
text:
Good night


When I tried to format the HDD on Menu - Settings - Disks Management - Format Disk, Thundercache software
advised me that couldn't format the Hard Driver. The same HDD can be formatted by Speedr 0.9. If I add this formatted driver by Speedr on Thundercache it appears like corrupted, but Thunder couldn't fix this problem too.
For this reason, I believe that Thunder can't manage thid disk, and probably you can solve this for the users of this software.
Â 
Thanks
Â 
Edson
